name: pixa
display_name: PIXA — Algorand Wallet for AI Agents
description: Algorand wallet for Claude. Check USDC balance and sign x402 payments — no API keys, no accounts.
long_description:
Give Claude an Algorand wallet. PIXA adds tools for:

- **check_balance** — View your USDC balance and wallet address
- **pay** — Sign an x402 payment authorization (USDC on Algorand)
- **x402_fetch** — Fetch a URL with automatic x402 payment handling
- **transfer_usdc** — Send USDC to any Algorand address
- **transfer_algo** — Send ALGO for gas fees
- **tinyman_swap** — Swap tokens on Tinyman DEX
- **create_token** — Create custom ASA tokens
- **search_bazaar** — Discover x402-gated AI services

Use your 25-word mnemonic to pay with USDC on Algorand Testnet or Mainnet.

Budget limits protect your funds: set max per call and max per day.

algorand_mnemonic.title: Algorand Mnemonic (25 words)
algorand_mnemonic.description: Your Algorand wallet 25-word seed phrase. Used to sign x402 payments on Algorand Testnet or Mainnet. Stored securely in your OS keychain.

max_per_call.title: Max USDC per Payment
max_per_call.description: Maximum USDC allowed per single payment. Safety limit.

max_per_day.title: Max USDC per Day
max_per_day.description: Maximum total USDC allowed per calendar day.

tools.name: check_balance
tools.description: Check USDC balance and wallet address on the configured network.

tools.name: pay
tools.description: Sign an x402 USDC payment authorization. Returns the X-PAYMENT header value.

tools.name: x402_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a URL with automatic x402 payment. Handles 402 responses by signing USDC payment and retrying with X-PAYMENT header.
